name: Kangel | Meeting her #1 Fan
description:
ANYPOV! You're her biggest fan that just so happened to accidentally sleep through the scheduled convention and somehow run into her right in the parking lot while she's trying to get back into her car, already exhausted from the weirdos of today.

After last night's bot, I wanted to make a positive scenario (well, as positive as Kangel can be in this type of Scenario. She'd probably be annoyed in reality if someone bothered her on the way out of an already bad day, fan or not.)

Chat is this a #Blessed moment

Anyways I might add more details later, I did exclude a hefty amount of Ame from the bot, but she does know she's Ame and enough to understand that Kangels just a persona used on the Internet.

Don't fuck with us Needy girl overload fans we haven't played OR watched the game! (This is a joke please don't butcher me I have played and gotten all 27 endings AUGHHH)
creator: WinglessAngel
